Meet Your Barber

Cathy — Owner & Barber

The Rusty Blade is Dundalk's home for quality cuts and classic barbershop culture. Cathy brings a personal touch to every appointment — no rush, no assembly line, just great work done right.

Whether you're after a clean fade, a classic cut, or a straight razor shave, you're in good hands. Every client gets the time and attention they deserve.

Accepting new clients 10am–3pm only, Monday through Friday. No weekends.
